items.title: Azure Logic Apps Adds Sandboxed Code Interpreters to Agent Workflows
items.summaryShort: Azure Logic Apps Adds Sandboxed Code Interpreters to Agent Workflows. Microsoft added sandboxed code interpreters to Azure Logic Apps, enabling agents within integration workflows to generate and execute Python, JavaScript, C#, and PowerShe

items.title: Presentation: Designing AI Platforms for Reliability: Tools for Certainty, Agents for Discovery
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Designing AI Platforms for Reliability: Tools for Certainty, Agents for Discovery. Aaron Erickson discusses the evolution of AI workflows, shifting from "vibe checking" to building reliable, multi-agent frameworks.

items.title: Pullfrog AI: Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternative Powered by GitHub Actions
items.summaryShort: Pullfrog AI: Open-Source CodeRabbit Alternative Powered by GitHub Actions. Pullfrog is an open-source AI-powered GitHub bot by Colin McDonnell, designed for automation in GitHub Actions.

items.title: Platform Engineering Labs Expands formae with Kubernetes Support, Native Helm Integration

items.title: FAA orders SpaceX to investigate Starship V3 booster failure
items.summaryShort: FAA orders SpaceX to investigate Starship V3 booster failure. Starship is grounded until SpaceX finds out why the first V3 booster failed during its first test flight.

items.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
items.summaryShort: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup. Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200.

items.title: ElevenLabs's new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
items.summaryShort: ElevenLabs's new music generation model can switch genres mid-track. ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting rest of the track
